## Chapter 1: Version Control
- [ ] Napravio app i pratio promene bez Gita
- [ ] git init, add, commit
- [ ] git log, diff, stash, checkout
- [ ] Oporavak od broken stanja

## Chapter 2: Dependency Management
- [ ] Simulirao "works on my machine" problem
- [ ] Napravio venv i pip freeze
- [ ] requirements.txt i .gitignore u repo

## Chapter 3: Infrastructure Provisioning
- [ ] Ručno podigao VM-ove (osetio problem)
- [ ] terraform init / plan / apply
- [ ] user_data provisioning skripte

## Chapter 4: Containerization
- [ ] Napravio Dockerfile
- [ ] docker build & run
- [ ] Deployment image-a na VM-ove

## Chapter 5: Multi-service Applications
- [ ] Dodao Redis u app
- [ ] docker-compose.yml sa depends_on
- [ ] Stack se podiže jednom komandom

## Chapter 6: Scripted Automation
- [ ] Napravio build.sh i deploy.sh
- [ ] set -euo pipefail — razumeo zašto
- [ ] Image tagging po git commit hash-u
- [ ] Rollback na prethodni tag
